wording.headline: Candidate ready for human review
wording.body: Review candidate north_clear. The deterministic fixture rule measured a 28.9 NM closest approach and a geometric added-distance proxy of 6.5 NM (2.3%).
wording.caveat: Synthetic offline review evidence only; not a route, clearance, dispatch release, or operational recommendation.
